headerTitle: Senior FDE AI Engineer  ·  Multi-Agent Orchestration  ·  MCP Architecture  ·  Enterprise AI Deployment
subjectText: Senior Forward Deployed AI Engineer — Smartsheet (Bellevue, WA / Remote) · $227K–$245K
intro: Smartsheet describes a Senior FDE AI Engineer who owns the full engagement lifecycle — scope, architect, build, validate, hand off — and understands the Deployment Kit is the real deliverable. Four completed external engagements, 13 production platforms.
bullets: End-to-end AI deployment ownership — four complete external engagements at a sub-2-week MVP cadence: technical discovery to production deployment to structured handoff documentation. A repeatable FDE engagement system across roofing, home services, auto repair, and OOH advertising.

Multi-agent orchestration + MCP protocol in production — 14 live endpoints with multi-model routing (Claude Haiku/Sonnet/Opus + GPT-4o), tool use, MCP, HITL confirm-before-execute, and Zod-validated output. The Senior FDE AI architecture already operating at scale.

Deployment Kit discipline — CLAUDE.md structured context files, per-project architecture docs, and operational runbooks designed for non-engineers to operate independently. Standard close condition on every engagement. 25–50% travel workable.
matchNotes: Strong on FDE lifecycle, MCP production deployment, Deployment Kit discipline, and enablement leadership. Python is a partial gap vs TypeScript-primary. 6-10yr requirement is a stretch; 25-50% travel is workable.
